name: FACIS PV
info:
FACIS Simulation — PV generation subflow

Mirrors `src/simulators/pv_generation/simulator.py`:
  P_kw = P_nom * (G/1000) * (1 + γ*(T_mod - 25)) * (1 - losses)
  T_mod = T_amb + (NOCT - 20) * G/800

Input msg.payload:
  base_seed, entity_id, timestamp_ms, timestamp (ISO), site_id
  weather: { conditions: { ghi_w_m2, temperature_c } }
  optional config: { nominal_capacity_kwp, noct_c, temperature_coefficient_pct_per_c,
                     reference_temperature_c, system_losses_percent, system_id }

Output msg.payload (PVReading):
  { site_id, system_id, timestamp,
    readings: { power_output_kw, daily_energy_kwh, irradiance_w_m2,
                module_temperature_c, efficiency_percent } }

Daily energy is accumulated in flow context `pv_daily[entity_id]` keyed
on the UTC date string; resets at midnight UTC.

Physics duplicated in tests/flows/pv.spec.js — keep in sync.

name: pv compute
